strategy_summary: The body of the brown pelican is protected from impact during plunge-diving thanks to subcutaneous air-sacs. To learn more about pelican plunge-diving and how they manage impact, check out this video from KQED Deep Look .
mechanism:
The body of the brown pelican is protected from impact during plunge-diving thanks to subcutaneous air-sacs.

To learn more about pelican plunge-diving and how they manage impact, check out this video from KQED Deep Look .
